prompt: Can I bulk-upload my 70-product catalog to InfluencerSoft via API instead of clicking through the UI? Stripe integration is in place.

assertions.text: Identifies the correct API endpoint: API 1.0 AddGood (not API 2.0 — products require legacy API)
Mentions API 1.0 hash auth (MD5 of buildQuery + username + apikey concatenation)
WARNS the user that AddGood may be disabled per-account (returns error_code 2) and that as of 2026-05-08 it was disabled for the kebron tenant
Provides the escalation path to enable AddGood: email support@influencersoft.com or raise at Tech Tuesday
Suggests testing with a small batch first (or dry-run mode) before pushing all 70 products
